entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: The target crop used to evaluate plant growth promotion effects

entities.name: COMPOSTING

entities.description: The enhancement of plant growth parameters through the use of compost

entities.description: A cellulose-degrading microbe used for decomposing bagasse

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID
entities.description: A plant growth promoting hormone produced by the screened microbes

entities.name: CELLULASE
entities.description: An enzyme produced by the screened microbes for cellulose degradation

entities.name: LIPASE
entities.description: An enzyme produced by A. awamori and B. subtilis

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE
entities.description: A molecule produced specifically by A. awamori

entities.name: PHOSPHOROUS SOLUBILIZATION
entities.description: The ability to solubilize phosphorous, exhibited by A. awamori and B. subtilis
